metadata.name: vesta_core
metadata.description: VESTA living loyalty protocol: merchants, campaigns, points, alliances, badges

accounts.name: customer_ata
docs: during the transfer (owner/mint bindings).

instructions.name: earn_points_campaign
docs: Earn with a governed campaign applied (multiplier / flat bonus / quest).

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: owned by argus before the hook authority is burned (spec §3.2).

accounts.name: badge_ata
docs: does not exist when Anchor constraints run).

accounts.name: kleos_receipt
docs: The double-grant guard: init fails if it already exists — and it
survives a holder-side badge burn.

accounts.name: alliance_authority
docs: Handshake: unilateral joins cannot spoof rates (spec §3.6).

accounts.name: config
docs: (PDA seeds, discriminator, stored admin, and v1 length).

accounts.name: mint
docs: address is enforced by the PDA seeds.

accounts.name: treasury
docs: does not exist yet when Anchor constraints run); address verified there.

accounts.name: alliance_authority
docs: Anti-manipulation: rate changes need the alliance authority too.

instructions.name: set_token_attribute
docs: Attach/update a custom metadata attribute on the point token (enrichment).

accounts.name: point_mint
docs: is the merchant PDA. Written by the Token-2022 metadata update.

errors.name: PendingAdminMismatch
errors.msg: Pending admin does not match signer

errors.name: InvalidDecayRate
errors.msg: Decay rate must be within -10000..=0 bps

errors.name: InvalidEarnRate
errors.msg: Base earn rate out of bounds

errors.name: StaleVisitDay
errors.msg: visit_day does not match the current UTC day

errors.name: EarnCapExceeded
errors.msg: Earn amount exceeds the per-transaction cap

errors.name: CampaignInactive
errors.msg: Campaign is not active in the current window

errors.name: CampaignNotEligible
errors.msg: Customer does not meet the campaign's eligibility (spend/tier)

errors.name: SwapRateOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Swap rate is outside the alliance's governance bounds

errors.name: MintMismatch
errors.msg: Mint does not match the merchant point mint

errors.name: AlreadyInAlliance
errors.msg: Merchant already belongs to an alliance

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: ConversionFailed
errors.msg: Conversion return data missing or malformed

types.name: Achievement
docs: Kleos badge definition (phase 3). `merchant` first for memcmp catalogs.

types.name: Alliance
docs: Koinon alliance root; creator in the seeds kills permissionless id squatting.
Enterprise surface: alliance-level pause, member swap-rate governance bounds,
a swap spread (`fee_bps`, an anti-abuse haircut on cross-swaps), a display
category + metadata URI, and aggregate swap stats.

fields.name: paused
docs: Freeze all cross-swaps in the alliance.

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: Spread applied to each swap's output UI value (anti-abuse / spread), bps.

fields.name: min_rate_bps
docs: Governance bounds on member `rate_bps_to_alliance` (0 = unbounded).

types.name: AllianceMember
docs: Alliance membership: normalized swap rate + inbound-swap risk budget + stats.

types.name: Campaign
docs: A merchant engagement campaign (phase 3, enterprise/gamified). `merchant`
first for memcmp catalogs.

fields.name: kind
docs: `campaign_kind::*`.

fields.name: multiplier_bps
docs: MULTIPLIER: additive earn boost, bps (stacks with streak, jointly capped).

fields.name: flat_bonus
docs: FLAT_BONUS: raw points added per qualifying earn.

fields.name: quest_target
docs: QUEST: qualifying earns required to complete.

fields.name: quest_reward
docs: QUEST: raw-point reward on completion.

fields.name: min_spend_base
docs: Minimum qualifying spend (base minor units) for the campaign to apply.

fields.name: min_tier
docs: Minimum customer tier (VIP targeting).

fields.name: points_budget
docs: Total bonus-point budget; 0 = unlimited. Campaign stops paying when hit.

fields.name: per_customer_cap
docs: Max bonus a single customer may draw; 0 = unlimited.

fields.name: redemptions
docs: Count of qualifying applications (payouts).

types.name: CampaignProgress
docs: Per-(campaign, customer) participation state — enforces per-customer caps
and tracks quest progress. Created on first qualifying earn.

fields.name: visits
docs: Qualifying earns applied (quest counter).

fields.name: bonus_drawn
docs: Bonus raw points drawn by this customer under the campaign.

fields.name: completed
docs: Quest completed (reward already paid).

types.name: Config
docs: Global protocol config. Singleton PDA.

types.name: CustomerProfile
docs: Per merchant-customer pair.

fields.name: lifetime_spend_base
docs: Total qualifying spend (base minor units) seen across earns.

fields.name: campaigns_completed
docs: Count of quest-style campaigns completed.

types.name: KleosReceipt
docs: Double-grant guard that survives a holder-side badge burn.

types.name: Merchant
docs: One per merchant; authority is baked into the seeds (no key rotation in-scope).
Enterprise surface: a cold `authority` (owner, in the seeds) plus up to
`MAX_OPERATORS` hot delegate keys that may run day-to-day operations
(earn, campaigns, achievements) without the owner key; a merchant-level
pause; an admin-set `verified` trust flag; a display category + metadata
URI; and lifetime operational stats.

fields.name: operators
docs: Hot operational keys (earn/campaigns/achievements). Owner is implicit.

fields.name: paused
docs: Merchant-scoped freeze of earn/redeem, independent of the global pause.

fields.name: verified
docs: Protocol-admin-set trust badge (e.g. KYB-verified brand).

fields.name: category
docs: Display category (free-form enum; UI maps to a label).

fields.name: metadata_uri
docs: Off-chain profile JSON (logo, links, description).

types.name: Offer
docs: Redemption catalog entry. `merchant` is deliberately the first field so
getProgramAccounts can memcmp on it at offset 8.

fields.name: price_points
docs: Denominated in UI points ×10² (post-decay purchasing power).

types.name: Receipt
docs: Voucher for a redemption; indexed by the profile's on-chain counter.

types.name: UpdateCampaignArgs
docs: Partial in-flight retune. Owner may extend the window, grow the budget,
adjust the per-customer cap, or pause/resume — not change the kind or its
core payout params (those define the offer customers signed up for).

constants.name: CAMPAIGN_MAX_BPS
docs: Per-campaign multiplier bound (2.0×).

constants.name: DECIMALS
docs: UI points carry two implied decimals; all mints.

constants.name: MAX_ALLIANCE_FEE_BPS
docs: Alliance swap spread ceiling (10%).

constants.name: MAX_CAMPAIGN_BONUS
docs: Bonus-point ceiling for a single flat-bonus / quest payout, raw units
(= 10 000.00 pts). Bounds abuse of campaign bonuses.

constants.name: MAX_EARN_PER_TX
docs: Earn cap per transaction, raw units (= 10 000.00 pts).

constants.name: MAX_QUEST_TARGET
docs: Max quest length (qualifying visits).

constants.name: MAX_TOTAL_MULTIPLIER_BPS
docs: Joint cap over streak + campaign composition (2.4×).

constants.name: MIN_BASE_EARN_RATE
docs: `base_earn_rate` bounds: raw points per fiat minor unit (cent).

constants.name: STREAK_BPS_PER_DAY
docs: +2%/day of streak, capped at 30 days (≤ +6 000 bps).
